
# Introduction

This Trial Specifications Document (TSD) describes the design and technical details of the Management Strategy Evaluation (MSE) of South Atlantic albacore tuna (*Thunnus alalunga*; SALB), including the operating models, candidate management procedures, and performance metrics used to evaluate them.

The TSD is a **living document** that will be updated as the MSE progresses to reflect the current state of the analysis.

For more information on the South Atlantic Albacore (SALB) MSE process see the project [homepage](https://iccatsalb.bluematterscience.com/).

## SALB MSE Framework

The SALB MSE is built using the [openMSE](www.openMSE.com) framework. The analysis is fully reproducible: all code, functions, and objects used to build the operating models, candidate management procedures, and performance indicators are available in associated [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Blue-Matter/iccatSALB).

To reproduce the analysis, download the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Blue-Matter/iccatSALB), and work through the scripts in the `analysis` directory.

The operating models (OMs) were conditioned with Stock Synthesis 3 (SS3; [@methot2013]) and were based on the 2026 Albacore Stock Assessment (@sec-stock-assessment).
